# Global Wealth Management

We deliver comprehensive wealth management solutions with a view to achieving  strong long-term  investment results through a personalized approach to enrich the lives of our clients.

![Innovative, tailored advice](https://globalwealth.scotiabank.com/content/dam/SWM/Images/Advisor.png/_jcr_content/renditions/cq5dam.web.1280.1280.png)

[Integrated, tailored advice](https://globalwealth.scotiabank.com/en/home/advice.html)

We can help you reach your goals with innovative, tailored advice.

![Award-winning investment products](https://globalwealth.scotiabank.com/content/dam/scotiabank/global-wealth/Images/Investmen_48px.png/_jcr_content/renditions/cq5dam.web.1280.1280.png)

[Investment products](https://globalwealth.scotiabank.com/en/home/products.html)

We can help you reach your goals with investment products.

## **Our services**

Our services are available across 14 countries worldwide – please select your country:

choose a country:BahamasBVICanadaCaymanChileColombiaCuraçaoCosta RicaJamaicaMexicoPeruTrinidadUruguayUSA

### Wealth management advice and solutions

Wealth Management offers a full range of options to help address your financial needs - no matter how complex or simple your needs may be.

[Learn more about Wealth Management](https://globalwealth.scotiabank.com/en/home/canada/wealth-management-advice-and-solutions.html)

### Scotia Global Asset Management

As one of Canada’s largest asset managers, Scotia Global Asset Management and its affiliates offers a broad range of investment solutions to meet the diverse needs of clients across all levels of wealth in Canada and around the world.

[Learn more about Scotia Global Asset Management](https://globalwealth.scotiabank.com/en/home/canada/investment-management-products-and-solutions.html)

### Institutional asset management

Innovative and disciplined investment solutions tailored to your institutional needs.

[Learn more about Institutional asset management](https://globalwealth.scotiabank.com/en/home/canada/institutional-asset-management.html)

## News and information

A global perspective on current thoughts, viewpoints and strategies.

### Scotia Wealth Management

Enriched Thinking® means seeing not only the big picture, but all the little ones as well. Scotia Wealth Management is an innovative team-based approach to wealth management that address the entirety of your life – your family, your business, your future – one facet at a time.

[Watch video, Scotia Wealth Management](https://vimeo.com/275089878)

### Scotiabank Media Centre

View our recent news releases, tweets and more.

[Learn more, Scotiabank Media Centre](https://www.scotiabank.com/corporate/en/home/media-centre/media-centre.html)

![Back to top](<Base64-Image-Removed>)
